rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly engaged with the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and proposing specific fixes.
rationale.R1.7: Audited every load-bearing citation, flagged missing or incorrect references with precision.
rationale.RX.1: Marked uncertainties for key claims but could improve by explicitly stating confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed strictly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identified harmful patterns in the original content.
rationale.RX.5: Every change was annotated with sources and reasons, ensuring traceability.
